comment: lab4 SMART-PLUG TRAINING scenarios (10 of 16) held-in set for QL training. Held-OUT (test-only): 3, 4, 8, 12, 14, 15 (incl. the plug-trap scenario 3, spotlight-redundancy and energy-optimization cases). PlugZ1 starts OFF wherever the Z1 lamp is needed, so the agent learns the power dependency (z1lamp_on = Z1Light AND PlugZ1). Scenario 11 is the held-in plug-trap (switch on, plug off). Full sun coverage (ranks 0..3). Targets Z1=bright(3), Z2=bright(3).
description: sun=0, all off, plug off -> enable plug + both lamps
sun=0, both at target via lamps (plug on) -> hold
sun=1, all off, plug off -> enable plug + both lamps
sun=1, both at target via lamps (plug on) -> hold
sun=1, Z1 lit (plug on) at target, Z2 rank2 -> turn Z2 lamp on
sun=2, all off, plug off -> enable plug + both lamps
sun=2, both at target via lamps (plug on) -> hold
sun=2, Z1 switch ON but plug OFF (Z1 dark) while Z2 at target -> turn the smart plug on
sun=3, all off -> open both blinds (835 each, zero energy)
sun=3, both at target via blinds only -> hold
